papers.title: GLiGuard: Schema-Conditioned Classification for LLM Safeguard
papers.authors: Urchade Zaratiana, Mary Newhauser, George Hurn-Maloney, Ash Lewis
papers.method_en: GLiGuard is a 0.3B-parameter bidirectional encoder (adapted from GLiNER2) that reframes LLM safety moderation as schema-conditioned structured classification. Task names and candidate labels are encoded as a structured token schema in the input sequence, enabling a single forward pass to simultaneously evaluate prompt safety, response safety, jailbreak detection, and fine-grained harm categories — across all moderation dimensions without swapping models or prompt templates.
papers.method_zh: GLiGuard 是一个基于 GLiNER2 的 0.3B 参数双向编码器，将 LLM 内容安全审核重新定义为结构化分类任务。将任务名称和候选标签作为结构化 token schema 嵌入输入，通过单次双向前向传播同时评估提示安全性、响应安全性、越狱检测和细粒度危害类别。
papers.innovation_en: Shifts guardrail paradigm from autoregressive decoders (7B-27B) to a bidirectional encoder (0.3B). Schema-conditioned token encoding enables zero-shot generalization to new safety categories without re-training or new prompt templates.
papers.innovation_zh: 将 guardrail 范式从自回归解码器（7B-27B）转向双向编码器（0.3B）。schema-conditioned 推理方式支持对新安全类别的零样本扩展，无需重训练或更换 prompt 模板。
papers.key_metrics: 9 safety benchmarks: F1 competitive with 7B-27B models. Throughput: +16×. Latency: −17×. Model size: 23–90× smaller.

papers.title: Text-Guided Visual Representation Learning for Robust Multimodal E-Commerce Recommendation
papers.method_en: TGQ-Former (Text-Guided Q-Former) introduces a hybrid-query connector that splits visual token streams into two parallel paths: a metadata-anchored path guided by structured product metadata (name, category, attributes), and a free exploratory path retaining complementary visual evidence. A lightweight reliability-aware dual-gated vector modulation module adaptively calibrates both paths' contributions under noisy inputs.
papers.method_zh: TGQ-Former 通过混合查询连接器将视觉 token 流分为
两路，以结构化商品元数据为语义锚。轻量级可靠性感知双门控向量调制模块自适应校准两路贡献权重，抵抗图片噪声。
papers.innovation_en: First to explicitly incorporate structured product metadata as semantic guidance for Q-Former query generation, disentangled from free visual exploration. Directly addresses promotional overlay and background clutter in industrial e-commerce images.
papers.innovation_zh: 首次将结构化商品元数据显式引入 Q-Former 查询生成，与自由探索查询解耦，直接解决电商商品图片中促销遮挡和背景噪声问题。
papers.key_metrics: Large-scale real-world e-commerce full-pool retrieval: Hit Rate@100 avg +6.04% vs connector baselines; consistently outperforms end-to-end MLLMs.

papers.title: A General Framework for Multimodal LLM-Based Multimedia Understanding in Large-Scale Recommendation Systems
papers.authors: Yiming Zhu, Xu Liu, Ziyun Xu, Zheng Wu, Joena Zhang, Sirius Chen, Chenheli Hua, Silvester Yao, Qichao Que, Wentao Shi, Junfeng Pan, Linhong Zhu
papers.method_en: A tripartite MM-LLM framework for industrial recommendation: (1) Content Interpretation — LLaMA2+Q-Former generates descriptive captions from multimedia content; (2) Representation Extraction — captions are tokenized into categorical feature vectors compatible with DLRM; (3) Pipeline Integration — a compact 1.5B LLaMA2 variant satisfies real-time latency constraints. Deployed at Meta to generate real-time captions for UGC.
papers.method_zh: 三段式 MM-LLM 框架：(1) LLaMA2+Q-Former 生成多媒体内容字幕；(2) 字幕 token 化为 DLRM 兼容类别特征；(3) 1.5B 精简 LLM 满足实时约束。已在 Meta 平台部署。
papers.innovation_en: Explicitly solves the engineering interface between MM-LLMs and industrial DLRM recommendation stacks. Three-stage decoupling enables independent evolution of each component. Validated at Meta scale via A/B testing. Published at SIGIR '26.
papers.innovation_zh: 明确解决了 MM-LLM 与工业 DLRM 推荐栈的工程接口问题；三段式解耦设计便于各层独立演进；Meta 平台 A/B 测试验证；SIGIR '26 接收。
papers.key_metrics: Deployed at Meta production scale; significant improvement in user preference modeling fidelity (specific numbers not disclosed); SIGIR '26 accepted.

papers.title: Who Decides What Is Harmful? Content Moderation Policy Through A Multi-Agent Personalised Inference Framework
papers.method_en: A multi-agent LLM framework for personalised content moderation: Expert Agents handle specific harm categories; a Manager Agent orchestrates analysis and agent selection; a Ghost Profile Agent simulates individual user perspectives (age, cultural background, history) to produce personalised, context-sensitive moderation decisions beyond one-size-fits-all platform policies.
papers.method_zh: 多智能体 LLM 内容审核框架：专家智能体负责特定危害类别，管理智能体协调分析，幽灵档案智能体模拟个体用户敏感度视角，输出个性化审核决策。
papers.innovation_en: Reframes moderation governance from platform-centric (binary safe/unsafe) to user-sensitivity-adaptive. Ghost Profile Agent simulating individual user perspectives is a novel mechanism for aligning moderation with governance legitimacy theory.
papers.innovation_zh: 将内容审核从平台中心（二元安全/不安全）转向用户敏感度自适应。幽灵档案智能体模拟个体用户视角，是治理正当性理论与 LLM agent 实践的新融合。
papers.key_metrics: Qualitative framework validation. Focus on governance legitimacy rather than raw accuracy metrics.

papers.title: Insights Generator: Systematic Corpus-Level Trace Diagnostics for LLM Agents
papers.method_en: Insights Generator (IG) is a multi-agent system for corpus-level diagnostics of LLM agent execution traces. Given a corpus of traces, IG proposes hypotheses about systematic behavioral patterns, tests them across the corpus, and produces evidence-backed natural-language insight reports. Each insight is linked to supporting trace evidence, enabling actionable debugging at production scale.
papers.method_zh: Insights Generator 是一个对 LLM agent 执行轨迹语料库进行系统性诊断的多智能体系统，通过假设提出-验证循环发现跨 trace 规律性模式，生成有证据支撑的洞察报告。
papers.innovation_en: Elevates LLM agent debugging from single-trace inspection to corpus-level pattern discovery. Hypothesis-driven analysis ensures insight credibility and reproducibility at production scale.
papers.innovation_zh: 将 agent 调试从单轨迹检查提升至语料库级规律性发现。假设驱动分析确保洞察可信度和可复现性。
papers.key_metrics: Evaluated on qualitative (rubric-based report quality) and quantitative (downstream performance improvement after implementing IG insights) dimensions.

papers.title: SkillsVote: Lifecycle Governance of Agent Skills from Collection, Recommendation to Evolution
papers.authors: Hongyi Liu, Haoyan Yang, Tao Jiang, Bo Tang, Feiyu Xiong, Zhiyu Li
papers.method_en: SkillsVote is a lifecycle governance framework for LLM agent skills. Agent Skills are defined as experience schemas coupling executable scripts with non-executable procedural guidance. The framework profiles a million-scale open-source corpus for environment requirements, quality, and verifiability, synthesizes verification tasks, and performs agentic library search before execution to expose structured skill context and prevent low-quality skills from polluting the knowledge base.
papers.method_zh: SkillsVote 是 LLM agent 技能全生命周期治理框架，将技能定义为耦合可执行脚本和程序性指引的经验模式。对百万级语料库进行质量画像，通过可验证性过滤和执行前 agentic 库搜索防止低质量技能污染知识库。
papers.innovation_en: Extends agent skill management from one-time collection to a full lifecycle (collection → recommendation → evolution). Verifiability-based filtering is a key contribution for building trustworthy agent skill infrastructure.
papers.innovation_zh: 将 agent 技能管理从单次收集延展到
全生命周期。基于可验证性的过滤是构建可信 agent 技能基础设施的关键贡献。
papers.key_metrics: Million-scale open-source corpus profiling; verifiability filtering demonstrates effective reduction in low-quality skill pollution.
